courses.metaDescription: [ES] Browse Florida driving courses and prep — TLSAE, teen driver education, driver improvement, 55+, permit test prep, and bilingual support.
courses.title: Rutas de educación y herramientas de preparación
courses.subtitle: Explora las rutas de aprendizaje, las herramientas de preparación y las experiencias de apoyo que Florida Top 1 Driving School está construyendo para los conductores de Florida.

courseDetail.leadBody: [ES] Tell us a bit about you and we'll help with the next step.

quiz.metaDescription: [ES] Answer a few quick questions and get a clear recommendation for the right Florida driving course or package.

contact.metaDescription: [ES] Get bilingual help choosing the right Florida driving course. Contact us by form, phone, email, or WhatsApp.
contact.title: Contacta a Florida Top 1 Driving School
contact.subtitle: Dinos si necesitas apoyo para conducir, ayuda en español, preparación para el permiso o si quieres conocer más sobre la demostración de la plataforma.

checkout.metaDescription: [ES] Review your selection and get started with Florida Top 1 Driving School.
checkout.title: [ES] Review & get started
checkout.note: [ES] Secure online payment is coming soon. Request enrollment now and our team will follow up to help you complete the next step.
checkout.emptyBody: [ES] Browse our courses and packages to choose what fits your situation.

admin.title: [ES] Lead dashboard
admin.subtitle: [ES] Internal view of captured leads (current server session).
admin.empty: [ES] No leads captured yet in this session.
